default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Vapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, programmatic SEO, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Calibration article on Twilio vs. Vapi comparison is ready for final review and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Content clusters and editorial roadmap with \~300 assignments developed, focusing on voice AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO mockup presented, showcasing interactive voice agent demos for specific industries](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Next steps involve finalizing content trees, publishing calibration article, and developing programmatic SEO pages](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2492.0)

## Topics

### Calibration Article: Twilio vs. Vapi Comparison

  - [Revised approach: direct comparison between Twilio's Conversation Relay and Vapi's full-stack suite](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Highlights Vapi's advantages and positions it as a superior alternative](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Ready for final review and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Content Clusters and Editorial Roadmap

  - [Developed \~300 content assignments across 5 main clusters](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Clusters include: TTS, STT, LLMs, Voice Agents, and Deep Dives](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Focus on balancing model comparisons with integration use cases](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Aim to avoid direct comparisons between partner companies (e.g., Assembly AI, Deepgram)](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Suggestion to create content on Vapi + partner model combinations (e.g., Vapi + Deepgram, Vapi + 11labs)](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)

### Programmatic SEO Strategy

  - [Mockup presented for industry-specific pages (e.g., healthcare, restaurants)](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Interactive elements to showcase Vapi's voice agent capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Design includes:](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [Job-specific conversation demos](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Model comparison interface](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
      - [Feature highlights and social proof](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [Discussion on gating vs. open access to demo features](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Integration of latency and cost visualizations for different models](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Plan to use Vapi's Web SDK for interactive elements](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [GrowthX team to set up initial account for development](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)
  - [Metadata can be attached to assistants for tracking and insights](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)

### Content Distribution and Traffic Generation

  - [Potential for creating a comprehensive AI/voice technology glossary](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Idea to develop engaging tools like AI personality tests for traffic generation](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2441.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Get final approval on content trees with suggested tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2496.0)
  - [Publish the calibration article (Twilio vs. Vapi comparison)](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2501.0)
  - [Finalize design of programmatic SEO mockup](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
  - [Provide timeline for programmatic SEO page development](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2507.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review Vapi SDK documentation and begin integration](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)
  - [Start executing on content clusters and ramping up editorial output](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Develop front-end for programmatic SEO pages](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2553.0)
  - [Aim to launch initial programmatic SEO page within the next week](https://fathom.video/share/1D9rx9sZ2ZuziVVegLxhCyzABfchADxT?tab=summary&timestamp=2569.0)

action_items.description: Update content cluster names to include "integrations". Share final version for approval.
Share Loom video of Kirkland's SDK exploration with Jordan
Send GrowthX account ID/API key to Jordan for usage tracking
Post update in Slack channel on work planned for next week
Finalize design mock-up for programmatic page
Begin front-end development for programmatic page
